parameters-en.Osc1 Oct: Sets the octave of Oscillator 1, with a 9-octave range.
parameters-en.Osc1 Glide: Controls the length of time it takes for Osc1 Oct and Osc1 Note to change when adjusting values manually or via snapshots and controllers. 0.0 causes immediate stepped changes whereas higher values cause the octave or note adjustment to glide smoothly.
parameters-en.Osc2 Oct: Sets the octave of Oscillator 2, with a 9-octave range.
parameters-en.Osc2 Glide: Controls the length of time it takes for Osc2 Oct and Osc2 Note to change when adjusting values manually or via snapshots and controllers. 0.0 causes immediate stepped changes whereas higher values cause the octave or note adjustment to glide smoothly.
parameters-en.Osc3 Oct: Sets the octave of Oscillator 3, with a 9-octave range.
parameters-en.Osc3 Glide: Controls the length of time it takes for Osc3 Oct and Osc3 Note to change when adjusting values manually or via snapshots and controllers. 0.0 causes immediate stepped changes whereas higher values cause the octave or note adjustment to glide smoothly.
parameters-en.Attack: Controls how fast the 3 Note Generator fades in when engaged, from 10 ms to 10 sec.
parameters-en.Decay: Controls how fast the 3 Note Generator fades out when bypassed, from 10 ms to 10 sec.
parameters-en.Dry Level: Controls the level of the dry signal.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
